# Prompt 23 - Documentation

# Enterprise Space Mission Data & AI Platform

> **Phase 23 - Documentation Consolidation**

Read `.github/prompts/_shared.prompt.md` first. This is a **documentation** phase: consolidate, do not re-implement.

---

# Objective

You are acting as Technical Program Manager and Lead Technical Writer.

Unify all phase docs into a coherent, navigable, portfolio-grade documentation set.

---

# Critical Rules

- No new features; only consolidate, cross-link, and standardize existing docs.
- Enterprise Markdown, Mermaid, consistent structure.

---

# Tasks

1. Documentation strategy, ownership, cadence.
2. Master index linking all phases.
3. Architecture overview & diagrams.
4. Onboarding/setup guide.
5. Operations runbook index.
6. Standards, conventions, style guide.
7. Consolidated glossary.
8. Publication locations & maintenance.
9. Trade-offs & 5 ADRs.

---

# Deliverables

```
docs/ index.md onboarding.md style-guide.md glossary.md README.md
```

# Acceptance Criteria

Master index complete, all phases cross-linked, glossary unified, onboarding works.

# Definition of Done

A new engineer can navigate the platform from one index. Stop here.
